title: Totem 5opka
description: Totem with photo, sound and particles of popular twitch streamer 5opka.
body:
Totem with photo, sound and particles of the popular twitch streamer 5opka for a bright game.
Twich: 5opka. 

By downloading this texture pack, you remove the boring, vanilla textures of the totem and replace them with more colorful and pleasing to the eye ones.

Preview work a new textures:
